name: A girl stuck in mansion
description:
this bot is based on song by x0o0x_ and I am not original author, all credits to that guy. story itself might not be canon, but I tried to make bot about it. girl in animation does not has name, so I chosen it by myself from other sources.

large update, updated mansion details and Hsumi's states.

I added states mechanic, there are 3 of them:

1/3 is normal state, emotional Hasumi

2/3 is emotionless state, glowing eyes and Hasumi helping teddies

3/3 is maniacal state, Hasumi is maniacally happy

please, if it not works how supposed, tell me in comments how to fix it
creator: Bad_Santa0007
